Bash(python3 -c "
content = open\(r'D:\\ai-bytes-leaning-22nd-feb-2026 Backup\\lesson_generative_ai_v2.html', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)
checks = [
  \('<!DOCTYPE html>', 'doctype'\),
  \('nav-brand', 'top nav'\),
  \('progress-rail', 'right rail'\),
  \('id=\\"hook\\"', 'hook section'\),
  \('id=\\"vi\\"', 'video insight'\),
  \('id=\\"found\\"', 'foundation'\),
  \('id=\\"types\\"', 'type cards'\),
  \('id=\\"anat\\"', 'anatomy'\),
  \('id=\\"punch\\"', 'punch quote'\),
  \('id=\\"pred\\"', 'prediction'\),
  \('id=\\"mmap\\"', 'mindmap'\),
  \('id=\\"flow\\"', 'flow diagram'\),
  \('id=\\"ind\\"', 'industry tabs'\),
  \('id=\\"int\\"', 'interactive code'\),
  \('id=\\"app\\"', 'applied case'\),
  \('id=\\"warn\\"', 'warning'\),
  \('id=\\"ex\\"', 'exercise'\),
  \('id=\\"recap\\"', 'recap'\),
  \('id=\\"quiz\\"', 'quiz'\),
  \('id=\\"terms\\"', 'key terms'\),
  \('id=\\"comp\\"', 'completion'\),
  \('scramble', 'scramble animation'\),
  \('IntersectionObserver', 'intersection observer'\),
  \('ScrollTrigger', 'scroll trigger'\),
  \('mindmap', 'mindmap js'\),
  \('doPred', 'prediction js'\),
  \('doTab', 'tabs js'\),
  \('doQ', 'quiz js'\),
  \('doAcc', 'accordion js'\),
  \('</html>', 'closing tag'\),
]
all_ok = True
for needle, label in checks:
    found = needle in content
    status = 'OK' if found else 'MISSING'
    if not found: all_ok = False
    print\(f'  [{status:7s}] {label}'\)
print\(\)
print\(f'Total size: {len\(content\):,} chars'\)
print\('All checks passed!' if all_ok else 'SOME CHECKS FAILED'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
path = r'D:\\ai-bytes-leaning-22nd-feb-2026 Backup\\lesson_generative_ai_v2.html'
with open\(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)
fixed = content.replace\('<\\/script>', '</script>'\)
print\(f'Replacements made: {content.count\(chr\(60\)+chr\(47\)+\\"script>\\"\)  }'\)
with open\(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    f.write\(fixed\)
print\('Done'\)
")
